title: psychotria borbonica
intro: Psychotria borbonica, also known as the Madagascar king, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Psychotria borbonica include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory issues, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. The herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is also used in some regions to prepare a medicinal drink.
